name: flowpilot-monorepo
description: FlowPilot - Headless TypeScript library for product tours and onboarding flows

scripts.size:core: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='packages/core/dist/index.js';const b=fs.existsSync(p)?fs.statSync(p).size:0;console.log('core bytes:',b);if(b>35000){console.error('core bundle too large');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.size:react: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='packages/react/dist/index.js';const b=fs.existsSync(p)?fs.statSync(p).size:0;console.log('react bytes:',b);if(b>10000){console.error('react bundle too large');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.bundle:check: pnpm run build && pnpm run size:core && pnpm run size:react
scripts.validate:types: pnpm --filter @flowpilot/core run type-check && pnpm --filter @flowpilot/react run type-check
scripts.validate:packages: pnpm run validate:types && pnpm run bundle:check
